name: Tavern Brawler
description: Enhanced Unarmed Strike: When you hit with your Unarmed Strike and deal damage, you can deal Bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your Strength modifier instead of the normal damage of an Unarmed Strike. Damage Rerolls: Whenever you roll a damage die for your Unarmed Strike or an improvised weapon, you can reroll the die if it rolls a 1, and you must use the new roll. Improvised Weaponry: You have proficiency with improvised weapons. Push: When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike or an improvised weapon, you can deal damage to the target and also push it 5 feet from you as part of the same attack.
